title: Show HN Earned vs. Burned, Claude skill for measuring AI delivery value
abstract: Are you struggling to calculate the ROI of your AI projects? Claude has got you covered, like adding a smart calculator to your financial statements. See exactly where you're earning and burning with AI investments—no more guesswork! Give it a try now.
abstract_zh: 你还在为AI项目算不清投入和产出吗？Claude技能来帮你，就像在财务报表上加了个“智能计算器”，让你的AI投资一目了然！赚了多少，烧了多少，全搞定。赶紧试试吧！
